goal: Fetch the homepage of example.com, extract all links, and save them to links.txt

steps.description: Fetch the HTML content of example.com
Extract all hyperlinks from the HTML
Save the list of links to links.txt

available_tools.name: search_web
available_tools.description: Search the web using a query string and return a list of result URLs with snippets

available_tools.name: parse_html
available_tools.description: Parse an HTML string and extract structured elements by CSS selector or tag name

available_tools.name: extract_links
available_tools.description: Extract all hyperlinks (anchor href attributes) from an HTML document

available_tools.name: extract_text
available_tools.description: Strip all HTML tags and extract plain text content from an HTML document

available_tools.name: screenshot_page
available_tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a rendered web page and return it as a PNG image

available_tools.name: check_status
available_tools.description: Send an HTTP HEAD request and return the status code and response headers

available_tools.name: download_file
available_tools.description: Download a file from a URL and save it to a specified local path

available_tools.name: submit_form
available_tools.description: Submit an HTML form with provided field values via HTTP POST

available_tools.name: get_headers
available_tools.description: Retrieve HTTP response headers for a given URL without downloading the body

available_tools.name: measure_performance
available_tools.description: Measure page load performance metrics (TTFB, FCP, LCP)

unavailable_tool.name: fetch_url
unavailable_tool.description: Fetch the raw HTML content of a given URL via HTTP GET request

available_tools.name: fetch_url
available_tools.description: Fetch the raw HTML content of a given URL via HTTP GET request

available_tools.name: search_web
available_tools.description: Search the web using a query string and return a list of result URLs with snippets

available_tools.name: parse_html
available_tools.description: Parse an HTML string and extract structured elements by CSS selector or tag name

available_tools.name: extract_links
available_tools.description: Extract all hyperlinks (anchor href attributes) from an HTML document

available_tools.name: extract_text
available_tools.description: Strip all HTML tags and extract plain text content from an HTML document

available_tools.name: screenshot_page
available_tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a rendered web page and return it as a PNG image

available_tools.name: check_status
available_tools.description: Send an HTTP HEAD request and return the status code and response headers

available_tools.name: download_file
available_tools.description: Download a file from a URL and save it to a specified local path

available_tools.name: submit_form
available_tools.description: Submit an HTML form with provided field values via HTTP POST

available_tools.name: get_headers
available_tools.description: Retrieve HTTP response headers for a given URL without downloading the body

unavailable_tool.name: bypass_rate_limit
unavailable_tool.description: Rotate through a pool of proxy IPs to avoid rate limiting on repeated requests
